author: Austin Crawford
title: ZenBusiness
content:
ZenBusiness is an AI-powered platform that helps entrepreneurs start strong and stay compliant. We simplify business formation and ongoing compliance while helping protect owners from personal liability. Forming an LLC in Rhode Island involves appointing a resident agent and filing the Articles of Organization, among other steps. Learn more about these steps to establish an LLC in Rhode Island and help ensure a solid foundation for your business.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Sawpit Tree Company LLC
summary: Sam Schlepphorst, the owner of the company, brings over a decade of hands-on experience in professional tree care. With a strong reputation for quality, safety, and environmental stewardship, Sam has become a trusted name in the arboriculture community.
content:
Sam Schlepphorst, the owner of the company, brings over a decade of hands-on experience in professional tree care. With a strong reputation for quality, safety, and environmental stewardship, Sam has become a trusted name in the arboriculture community.

 

As a Certified Arborist with the International Society of Arboriculture (ISA), Sam combines scientific expertise with practical skill. He specializes in technical tree work, particularly in challenging environments that require careful planning, precision, and critical thinking. His work reflects a deep respect for the natural landscape, with an emphasis on sustainable practices that preserve the integrity of the region's forests.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Thanksgiving Dinner at The Barn at Spring House
summary: Join us for Thanksgiving Dinner at The Barn at The Spring House. 56.95 for adults and 16.95 for children 12 and under. Seatings from 12pm-5pm. Call 401-466-5844 to book your dinner reservation or book online https://www.opentable.com/r/the-barn-block-island.
content:

author: Austin Crawford
title: Fresh, LLC / FreshMaps​
summary: We believe life is an adventure and the world contains so many things to explore. Our scavenger hunts, driving tours and digital learning maps help you experience local areas in new and exciting ways.  Our mobile app guides you to discover, learn, play and capture memories along the way.  Make it a game by earning points as you go!

author: Austin Crawford
title: Virginica Pizza
summary: Virginica Pizza is the restaurant of the oyster farm, Great Salt Pond Oyster Co.  Serving handcrafted sourdough pizza, raw bar, and daily specials. Reimagining a local food system that strengthens the resiliency of Block Island’s food sources and economy. Influenced by the season, the land and our saltwater foodway. A refuge for appetites, conviviality, and hospitality..
content:
Virginica Pizza is the restaurant of the oyster farm, Great Salt Pond Oyster Co.  Serving handcrafted sourdough pizza, raw bar, and daily specials. Reimagining a local food system that strengthens the resiliency of Block Island’s food sources and economy. Influenced by the season, the land and our saltwater foodway. A refuge for appetites, conviviality, and hospitality..

author: Austin Crawford
title: Herdman Hospitality
summary: Hospitality is at the core of what we do. We go beyond the standard rental experience by offering personalized recommendations, a seamless check-in process, and a dedicated team available to assist with anything you may need during your stay. At Herdman Hospitality, our mission is to elevate the rental experience with true hospitality, reimagined for the modern traveler. We’ve thoughtfully curated every detail to ensure that your time on the island is as comfortable and relaxing as possible. Because when you stay with us, you’re not just booking a rental—you’re coming home to your perfect island retreat.
content:

author: Austin Crawford
title: CARVE by Diamondblue
summary: CARVE by diamondblue is a surf clothing boutique, featuring curated apparel & accessories inspired by surf culture & island life. From breezy beachwear to laid-back everyday pieces, this store blends effortless style with premium quality. Discover exclusive Diamondblue designs, must-have seasonal staples, & a vibe that’s authentically Block Island. Located under the National Hotel.

author: Austin Crawford
title: The Figurehead Apartments and Penthouse
summary: The Figurehead blends modern convenience with Block Island charm. Built in 2000, the newer construction allows for fully air-conditioned units plus large bedrooms, bathrooms and living areas. Rent one unit for a small gathering or all 3 apartments for large groups with up to 24 guests.
content:
The Figurehead blends modern convenience with Block Island charm. Built in 2000, the newer construction allows for fully air-conditioned units plus large bedrooms, bathrooms and living areas. Rent one unit for a small gathering or all 3 apartments for large groups with up to 24 guests.

 

The 3 short-term rental apartments offer views of Old Harbor, Clayhead, and the Atlantic Ocean. These spacious units are conveniently located next to beaches, shops, restaurants, and the ferry dock, providing a perfect getaway without the need for a car.


Book Now

author: Austin Crawford
title: Henderson Roofing
summary: For over 25 years, Henderson Roofing has been Rhode Island’s trusted name in exterior remodeling. As a locally owned and operated company, we proudly deliver exceptional service backed by a customer satisfaction guarantee and a lifetime warranty on every project. Homeowners and businesses across Rhode Island and Eastern Connecticut rely on us for durable, high-quality solutions to provide lasting peace of mind. Offering roofing, siding, windows, doors, and gutters.
content:

author: Austin Crawford
title: Dark Horse Flowers
summary: Dark Horse Flowers is a local flower farm, owned and operated by lifelong islander Alexis McCabe. Ideal for those looking to support agriculture on Block Island and environmentally friendly flowers. Alexis uses organic growing methods, her “no spray” pollinator-friendly flowers can be found at the Block Island Farmers Market during the Summer season. Floral services are also offered for weddings and special events. To inquire, reach out directly at darkhorseflowers@gmail.com or through Instagram @dark_horse_flowers.
content:
Dark Horse Flowers is a local flower farm, owned and operated by lifelong islander Alexis McCabe. Ideal for those looking to support agriculture on Block Island and environmentally friendly flowers. Alexis uses organic growing methods, her “no spray” pollinator-friendly flowers can be found at the Block Island Farmers Market during the Summer season. Floral services are also offered for weddings and special events. To inquire, reach out directly at darkhorseflowers@gmail.com or through Instagram @dark_horse_flowers.

author: Austin Crawford
title: Ring & Rose Events
summary: Here at Ring & Rose Events, our mission is to transform your vision into a celebration that feels effortless, intentional, and unforgettable. Our commitment to delivering exceptional service embraces an adaptable approach, where no detail is too small and no task is too big. We combine thoughtful design, clear communication, and meticulous organization to ensure every event is not only beautiful, but also seamless behind the scenes.
